titleStmt.title: SII 7.197: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 197. (A.R. No. 29 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
This line is in continuation of the last line of the previousmattamāprauḍhadēvarāyamahārāyaru samastarājyamaṁ
pratipālisuva kāladalli Avara Ājñādhārakarumappa gaṇapaṇnoḍeyaru maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷutti¨rddaśakava¨rṣa 1373 neya prajāpatisaṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddhasaptami bṛhaspativāradalu tribhuvanacūḍāmaṇicaityālayada mukha
maṁṭapamaṁ sakalajanamanōnayanābhirāmamumatyāśca¨ryyakaramu mappaṁtu māḍisidarābhavyajanaṁgaḷāreṁdoḍe . kakkedēvaruseṭṭiyarāda caḷaseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 sēnāpatiyarige bhāge 1 ceṁñana dēvatiseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 beṭṭekēriya śāṁti
seṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 maḍe kāṁtuseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 Eḍa maiṁdi seṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 bāṇasi maiṁdiseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 Āḷvanāraṇaseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 kuḍelu Uttamaseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 heggaḍe dēvaruseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 jayamaiṁdise
ṭṭiyara Aḷiyaṁdirugaḷige bhāge 1 kājava dēvaruseṭṭi seṭṭi guṁmaṭaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 nōṭada cauḷiseṭṭi cadura cauḷiseṭṭigaḷige bhaṁḍāri kāmadēvaseṭṭi kakke kāmaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 nārāviya maiṁdiseṭṭige bhāge 1 Ā jiri
kōṭiseṭṭige bhāge 1 bhaṁgabrahmuseṭṭige bhāge 1 kurikāra dēvaruseṭṭi koṁḍe dēvatyaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 pe¨rghghaḍe pāṁḍiseṭṭige bhāge 1 naṁda kujiṁbiseṭṭiyara Aḷiyaṁdirugaḷige bāge 1 kakke dāsaseṭṭiyara Aḷiyaṁdi
rugaḷige bhāge 1 seṭṭi paradēsaseṭṭiyara Aḷiyaṁdirugaḷige bhāge 1 pūṁja hosabuseṭṭi caUṭa dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 Irali brahmadāsaseṭṭi Irali dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 birumaṇa Adhikārige bhāge 1 nārāviya padumaṇase
ṭṭi kājava birumaṇaseṭṭigaḷige nā śāṁtiseṭṭiyarige kuḍelu bālēṁduseṭṭige bhāge 1 bāṇasi paichaseṭṭige bhāge 1 kājava cauḷiseṭṭige bhāge 1 maleya Ādiyaṇnaseṭṭige bhāge 1 beṭṭekēriya va¨rddhamānaseṭṭige bhāge 1
nelli dēvaruseṭṭige bhāge 1 naṁda birumaṇaseṭṭige bhāge 1 Olepāḍiya dēvaruseṭṭige bhāge 1 beṭṭekēriya kōṭiseṭṭige bhāge 1 sēnapadēvaruseṭṭi maṁjaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 kōvāri dēvaruseṭṭi Ātana Aḷiya kudure nēmaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 Aḍiya
ṁta pāṁḍiseṭṭi Ātana Aḷiya seṭṭi kāṁtaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 nareya kaḍaṁbuseṭṭi seṭṭi mahēśvaraseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 naṁda dēvaruseṭṭi Avana Aḷiya Ūjō kāṁtaṇnaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 koṁḍa kāṁtaṇaseṭṭige bhāge 1 sālisa śāṁtiseṭṭige bhāge 1
beṁgaḍukada hosabuseṭṭige bhāge Oṁdu 1 kurikāra cauṁḍiseṭṭiya Aḷiya caUṭa kōṭēśvaraseṭṭige bhāge 1 kutyāra bālidēvaseṭṭi Avana taṁma Āḷva dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 seṭṭi kōṭēśvaraseṭṭi Avana Aḷiya suḷḷa brahmuseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1
Amēca kāṁtuseṭṭitige bhāge 1 bāṇasi dēvaruseṭṭiya sose ka¨rpporoseṭṭitige bhāge 1 bhaṁḍāri nēmaṇnaseṭṭi cenniseṭṭiyavara tāyi bāle mudduseṭṭitige bhāge 1There is a blank space for about twenty-five letters after this.
There is a blank space for about eight syllables in the beginninghittila kuṁḍiseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru maḷta padumiseṭṭi Avara taṁma seṭṭi dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 hittila kuṁḍiseṭṭiya Aḷiya caUṭa dēvaruseṭṭiga bhāge 1 mudduseṭṭitiya maga seṭṭi mā¨rkkaṁḍaseṭṭige
Eḷameya nānareṁgaseṭṭige bhāge 1 ĀIri nāraṇaseṭṭige bhāge 1 nōṭada maṁjaṇnaseṭṭiya makkaḷu nōṭada dēvaruseṭṭi nōṭada kēśavaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 taṁmiseṭṭiya maga malluseṭṭige bhāge 1 Uḷḷiri kāṁtaṇnaseṭṭiya makkaḷu Uḷḷiri brahmaṇnaseṭṭi
Uḷḷiri Āluseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 seṭṭi kōṭiyaṇnaseṭṭige bhāge 1 Uḷḷiya paraduseṭṭiya Aḷiya paradu brahmaseṭṭige bhāge 1 [.]
Digital edition of SII 7.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
